feed.title: Zirui Wen
feed.subtitle: Academic homepage of Zirui Wen, M.S. student in Applied Artificial Intelligence at Stevens Institute of Technology.

entry.title: Mathematical Preliminaries: Manifolds
entry.content:
Mathematical Preliminaries

What is Manifold?

Thinking of the earth, the earth as a whole is a sphere. However, if you stand on a small patch of ground, it will appear approximately flat. The earth surface is a 2-dimension
entry.summary: A short note on the intuition behind manifolds.
